trivia: The baseline Next Generation 737 launched the family that dominated the 2000s. Southwest built an empire on it, and its airframe became the Boeing Business Jet and military C-40.
NG numbers shrink every year as MAXes arrive, so the -700 is quietly sliding from everyday catch toward era piece.
funFacts: The basis of the original Boeing Business Jet.
Southwest Airlines was the launch customer.
